TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Volodymyr_Zelenskyy, title = Volodymyr_Zelenskyy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Volodymyr_Zelenskyy} }

S.FORM: Volodymyr Zelenskyy ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 1, Volodymyr Zelenskyy, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1978) mrhuw Ukraine ta' misuw hya' ga Volodymyr Zelenskyy, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Volodymyr Zelenskyy minkahul sa Kryvyi Rih na Ukraine. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1978 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun

Volodymyr Zelenskyy ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 1, Volodymyr Zelenskyy, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1978) mrhuw Ukraine ta' misuw hya' ga Volodymyr Zelenskyy, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Volodymyr Zelenskyy minkahul sa Kryvyi Rih na Ukraine. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1978 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: *olo*jmjr zelens~ɕkjj rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *olo*jmjr zelens~ɕkjj, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ukraine taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *olo*jmjr zelens~ɕkjj, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral *olo*jmjr zelens~ɕkjj minkaħul s~ɕa krj*ji riħ na ukraine. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
